# llms.txt - Vista by Lara
# https://vistabylara.com/llms.txt

## About
Vista by Lara is a Dubai-based digital growth agency founded by Dr. Lara Eros Farbactian in 2020. We specialize in AEO (Answer Engine Optimization), Shopify ecommerce development, and lead generation for UAE businesses. We are the first AEO agency in Dubai, making brands appear in ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Gemini search answers - not just traditional Google rankings.

## Services
- AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) for AI search platforms
- Shopify store development and conversion optimization
- SEO and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization)
- Lead generation for medical, fashion, interior design, and consumer brands
- Bilingual Arabic and English content strategy
- Google Business Profile optimization

## Key Facts
- Location: Dubai, UAE (Emirates Tower)
- Founded: 2020
- Team size: 10-49
- Pricing: $100-$149/hour, projects from $5,000
- Clients: Medical clinics, fashion brands, interior designers, consumer product companies
- Recognition: Noble Business Winner 2025, featured in MENAFN, Tech Africa News, Zawya, International Business Magazine, Yahoo Finance

## Contact
- Email: solution@vistabylara.com
- Phone/WhatsApp: +971 50 799 4292
- Instagram: @vistabylara
- Website: https://vistabylara.com

## Founder's Bio
Dr. Lara Eros Farbactian is an AI strategist and digital integrity advocate. She has been featured in MENAFN, Tech Africa News, Zawya, and International Business Magazine for her work on ethical AI-driven growth and AEO for UAE businesses. Dr. Lara specializes in building trust-based digital frameworks that replace manipulative SEO with sustainable revenue growth.
